labels.name: weapon_visible
labels.description: A visible weapon-like object where subtype is not known.

labels.name: fire_or_smoke
labels.description: Visible fire, smoke, or heavy smoke plume.

labels.name: vehicle_approaching
labels.description: A vehicle visible in a path or position that may require awareness.

labels.name: obstacle
labels.description: A visible obstacle in the user's path.

labels.name: person_close
labels.description: A person visibly close to the user without inferring intent.

labels.name: low_light
labels.description: Low-light condition detected from frame statistics.
